mistake.title: Mistake
mistake.description: A record of a student mistake and its generated analogous questions.

userId.description: Unique ID of the user who owns this record.

originalText.description: The recognized text of the original mistake.

originalImageUrl.description: URL of the uploaded image (if applicable).

userAnswer.description: The answer the user originally provided.

correctAnswer.description: The correct answer to the original mistake.

knowledgePoint.description: The core academic concept or knowledge point identifies by AI.

analysis.description: Analysis focusing on common mistake points.

mistakes.description: Collection of mistakes saved by users.
